color.ts.createMatrix: Allocate a reused Float32Array from the matrix pool
color.ts.dropMatrix: Return a Float32Array to the matrix pool
color.ts.createColor: Create a new color object using a pooled matrix for values
color.ts.dropColor: Return a color's value matrix to the pool
color.ts.cloneColor: Clone a color into a new object with pooled matrix
color.ts.deriveColor: Create a new color in a target space, converting values if needed
color.ts.mutateColor: Mutate a color in-place to a target space
color.ts.mountMatrix: Initialize the matrix pool with a given size
color.ts.clearMatrix: Clear all pooled matrices (reset HEAD to -1)
color.ts.countMatrix: Return the number of available matrices in the pool

convert.ts.getPath: Find the shortest conversion path between two color spaces (private)
convert.ts.bake: Bake a sequence of conversion steps into a single optimized function (private)
convert.ts.convertColor: Convert a color value from one space to another using the precomputed dispatch table

format.ts.serialize: Serialize a numeric value with optional unit and precision (private)
format.ts.rgbToHex: Convert an RGB color value to hex string (private)
format.ts.rgbToCss: Format RGB color to CSS rgb() string (private)
format.ts.hslToCss: Format HSL color to CSS hsl() string (private)
format.ts.hwbToCss: Format HWB color to CSS hwb() string (private)
format.ts.labToCss: Format Lab color to CSS lab() string (private)
format.ts.lchToCss: Format LCh color to CSS lch() string (private)
format.ts.oklabToCss: Format Oklab color to CSS oklab() string (private)
format.ts.oklchToCss: Format Oklch color to CSS oklch() string (private)
format.ts.lrgbToCss: Format linear RGB color to CSS color(srgb-linear) string (private)
format.ts.xyz50ToCss: Format XYZ D50 color to CSS color(xyz-d50) string (private)
format.ts.xyz65ToCss: Format XYZ D65 color to CSS color(xyz-d65) string (private)
format.ts.formatCss: Format a color to CSS string (hex or functional notation)

parse.ts.parseHex: Parse a hex color string (3/4/6/8 digits) into an RGB color
parse.ts.parseCss: Parse a CSS color function (e.g., rgb(), hsl()) into a color of the given space
parse.ts.parseColor: Parse any supported color string (hex or CSS color function) into a color

analyze.ts.getDistance: Calculate color distance using ITP, DeltaE, or OKLab
analyze.ts.sortColors: Sort colors by luminance, hue, chroma, or distance
analyze.ts.averageColor: Compute average color from an array
analyze.ts.adaptColor: Adapt color to different white point
analyze.ts.isEqual: Check semantic equality with cross-space and hue-wrap support

contrast.ts.matchContrast: Adjust color to meet target contrast
contrast.ts.pickContrast: Pick best contrasting color from options

gamut.ts.clampHsv: Clamp HSL/HSV/HWB saturation/lightness and wrap hue
gamut.ts.clampPolar: Clamp LCH/OKLCH lightness and chroma, wrap hue
gamut.ts.inGamut: Check if color fits in sRGB gamut
gamut.ts.toGamut: Perceptually map color into sRGB via OKLCH chroma reduction

gradient.ts.buildStops: Internal string-builder for raw colors and stops (private)
gradient.ts.createSmoothGradient: Build multi-step gradient via polar interpolation
gradient.ts.createMultiColorGradient: Build gradient from evenly distributed colors

palette.ts.mixSubtractive: Mix two colors with subtractive mixing
palette.ts.createTints: Generate tints from color to white
palette.ts.createShades: Generate shades from color to black
palette.ts.createTonal: Generate full tonal range (black to color to white)

picker.ts.createPicker: Initialize stateful HSV controller; pivots input to pool-managed Color<'hsv'>
picker.ts.update: Coordinate-based update (x, y) for SV/H/A with 0.001 epsilon tolerance
picker.ts.assign: Synchronize state with external Color; implements significant-hue memory for grayscale
picker.ts.setHue: Direct hue mutation (0-360) with 0.1 epsilon check
picker.ts.setSaturation: Direct saturation mutation (0-1) with 0.001 epsilon check
picker.ts.setValue: Direct brightness mutation (0-1) with 0.001 epsilon check
picker.ts.setAlpha: Direct alpha mutation (0-1) with 0.001 epsilon check
picker.ts.subscribe: Agnostic 60fps observer; passes internal hsv reference to subscribers
picker.ts.getValue: Return POJO representation {h, s, v, a} for UI components
picker.ts.getColor: Return fresh pool-based clone of current state (requires dropColor)
picker.ts.getSolid: Return fresh pool-based clone with alpha forced to 1 (requires dropColor)
picker.ts.dispose: Release internal hsv reference to pool and clear all subscribers
